general.reset employee password: Use the internal IT portal and click Reset Password.
general.create support ticket: Log into ServiceDesk and create a new ticket.
general.book the issue: To book the issue, log it as a support ticket in ServiceDesk with the affected module and severity.
general.expense reimbursement: Submit expense claims through the Finance Portal within 30 days of purchase.

apple.fruit inventory: Apple inventory performance is stable this month with warehouse stock levels within target range.
apple.dessert category: Premium dessert category performance shows a 12% month-on-month increase in sales.
apple.product brand: Apple product brand performance indicates strong sales in enterprise device requests.

line.production line: Production line status indicates the unit is halted pending maintenance clearance.
line.telephone line: Telephone line status shows no active outage in the support center.
line.internet line: Internet line monitoring reports intermittent connectivity in the operations wing.

line band hai.production line halted: Production unit is currently paused due to a conveyor safety alert.
line band hai.communication line issue: Communication line incident has been routed to network operations for restoration.

ticket.support ticket: Support ticket volume increased by 8% this week in the IT helpdesk queue.
ticket.travel ticket: Travel ticket processing is active in the employee travel desk workflow.

book the issue.log a support ticket: Issue has been interpreted as a support request. Please record it in ServiceDesk with impact details.
book the issue.reserve a documented issue record: Issue has been interpreted as an internal issue record reservation for audit follow-up.
